name: Eyjafjallajökull
eruptionHistory: The 2010 eruption caused unprecedented disruption to European air travel, stranding millions of passengers. Previous eruptions in 1821-1823 and 920 CE.
description: Eyjafjallajökull gained worldwide fame in 2010 when its eruption produced an ash cloud that shut down European airspace for weeks, causing the largest air traffic disruption since World War II.
